entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Principal food crop grown extensively in India.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country with the largest area under rice cultivation.

entities.name: RICE-FALLOW CROPLANDS
entities.description: Areas where rice is grown during the Kharif season followed by fallow during the Rabi season.

entities.name: KHARIF GROWING SEASON
entities.description: Growing season from June to October.

entities.name: RABI SEASON
entities.description: Growing season from November to February.

entities.name: CENTRAL AND WESTERN STATES OF INDIA
entities.description: Region in India where rice areas are increasing and the study was conducted.

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate Resolution Imaging Spectroradiometer used for time series data.

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used at 250m spatial resolution for monitoring.

entities.name: GROUND SURVEY DATA
entities.description: Season-wise intensive data used for mapping rice areas.

entities.name: HIERARCHICAL CLASSIFICATION
entities.description: Technique applied to map rice areas and fallows.

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Technique applied to map rice areas and fallows.

entities.name: CHANGE DETECTION
entities.description: Process used to monitor the expansion of rice areas between 2000-2015 and 2010-2015.

relationships.target: CENTRAL AND WESTERN STATES OF INDIA
